korapay.reason: KoraPay exclusively processes payments in Nigerian Naira.

monnify.reason: Monnify exclusively processes payments in Nigerian Naira.

squad.reason: Squad exclusively processes payments in Nigerian Naira.

lenco.reason: Lenco exclusively processes payments in Nigerian Naira.

paystack.reason: Paystack supports payments in select African currencies and USD.

flutterwave.reason: Flutterwave supports payments in select African currencies and major foreign currencies.

billplz.reason: Billplz only processes payments in Malaysian Ringgit.

senangpay.reason: senangPay only processes payments in Malaysian Ringgit.

midtrans.reason: Midtrans only processes payments in Indonesian Rupiah.

vnpay.reason: VNPay only processes payments in Vietnamese Dong.

momo.reason: MoMo only processes payments in Vietnamese Dong.

dragonpay.reason: DragonPay only processes payments in Philippine Peso.

gcash.reason: GCash only processes payments in Philippine Peso.

xendit.reason: Xendit supports several Southeast Asian currencies.

ipay88.reason: iPay88 supports several Southeast Asian currencies.

omise.reason: Omise supports Thai Baht and several APAC currencies.

pagseguro.reason: PagSeguro only processes payments in Brazilian Real.

pix.reason: PIX is a Brazilian instant-payment system; only BRL is supported.

mercadopago.reason: Mercado Pago supports several LATAM currencies.

payu.reason: PayU supports Indian Rupee and several LATAM currencies.

razorpay.reason: Razorpay only processes payments in Indian Rupee.

phonepe.reason: PhonePe only processes payments in Indian Rupee.

upi.reason: UPI is an Indian payment rail; only INR is supported.

ideal.reason: iDEAL is a Dutch bank-transfer system; only EUR is supported.

giropay.reason: Giropay only processes payments in Euro.

bancontact.reason: Bancontact only processes payments in Euro.

mollie.reason: Mollie processes payments in Euro by default.
